product: Lakebase snapshot storage is now billed
tagline: Starting June 1, 2026, snapshot storage is billable for Lakebase Autoscaling.
what_it_does: Starting June 1, 2026, snapshot storage is billable for Lakebase Autoscaling. Snapshot storage size is shown on the Backup & Restore page. For pricing details, see the Lakebase pricing page.
why_it_matters: Lakebase creates snapshots instantly with minimal performance impact.
key_takeaway: Starting June 1, 2026, snapshot storage is billable for Lakebase Autoscaling.
